calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Court ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by Rhonda Fung. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2003 Continued To Jan-28-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in propria persona is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 1/28/2004 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by Vicki Gross, CSR #5525. (212)

Off Calendar Apr-24-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Palvir Kaur Shoker, Esq. of LADVA, SHOKER & ASSOCIATES 296-8844, moving to be relieved as counsel for plaintiff Donald Morgan

RULING:
No other appearance on this matter. The Court's tentative ruling was "hearing
required". Therefore, The Court granted Attorney Brian L. Larsen's MOTION To Be
Relieved As Counsel. Plaintiff's counsel is to prepare an order. (DAG/301/JU)
Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
